steps.dialogue: Great work! You learned that fractions are equivalent when they land in the same spot on the number line. When the numerator and denominator of a fraction are the same, like [fraction numerator=3 denominator=3]three thirds[/fraction], it makes a whole. Now, it's time to put our knowledge to work through practice problems.
You solved a really challenging problem. This kind of thinking will help you in the next modules.
